_meta.method: Same 3-factor consensus as refresh_fo_cloud.py (EMA alignment, MACD, pivot breakout, ROC5). votes==6 -> single-leg, votes in [4,5] -> capped-risk spread.

ICICIBANK.name: ICICIBANK
ICICIBANK.data_warning: Signals based on 2026-07-13 close (yfinance EOD, delayed/unofficial). Verify in Kite before trading.
ICICIBANK.commentary: WAIT (CE 2/6, PE 2/6 -- neither side reached the 4-vote threshold): price 1396.6 is above EMA18 (1377.49) and EMA50 (1338.3) -- established uptrend (+2 CE) | MACD (25.75) is below its signal line (28.04) -- bearish momentum (+1 PE) | price is between pivot support (1391.13) and resistance (1409.73) -- no breakout yet | 5-day momentum (ROC5 -2.12%) is strongly negative (+1 PE) ⚠ All 4 factors above are derived from the same single price series -- not independent confirmations. A high vote count means one strong trend measured 4 ways, not 4 separate signals agreeing.

HINDUNILVR.name: HINDUNILVR
HINDUNILVR.data_warning: ℹ 6/6 still gets the same capped-risk spread as every other vote level, not extra exposure — this system's own 3-year backtest found the old "6-vote = single-leg" rule was actually its worst-performing bucket (39.7% win, Sharpe 2.71 vs 41.9-45.3% win, Sharpe 3.0-4.8 for spreads).
